CustomField.inlineHelpText: OCCUPATIONAL HEALTH Have you ever had:
CustomField.label: OCCUPATIONAL HEALTH: Have you ever had:

value.fullName: Lower back, neck or thoracic spinal pain or strain (including back surgery)?
value.label: Lower back, neck or thoracic spinal pain or strain (including back surgery)?

value.fullName: Hip, knee or ankle pain or strain (including Sciatica)?
value.label: Hip, knee or ankle pain or strain (including Sciatica)?

value.fullName: Shoulder or neck or arm/wrist pain or strain?
value.label: Shoulder or neck or arm/wrist pain or strain?

value.fullName: Tenosynovitis, carpel tunnel or RSI?
value.label: Tenosynovitis, carpel tunnel or RSI?

value.fullName: Arthritis, rheumatism or painful joints or other musculoskeletal pain?
value.label: Arthritis, rheumatism or painful joints or other musculoskeletal pain?

value.fullName: Any broken bones or torn cartilage that impact your ability to carry out day to day tasks?
value.label: Any broken bones or torn cartilage that impact your ability to carry out day to day tasks?

value.fullName: Scars/deformations which may restrict physical movement?
value.label: Scars/deformations which may restrict physical movement?

value.fullName: Hernia?
value.label: Hernia?

value.fullName: Diabetes?
value.label: Diabetes?

value.fullName: Epilepsy, dizzy/giddy/fainting spells, blackouts or neurological disorder?
value.label: Epilepsy, dizzy/giddy/fainting spells, blackouts or neurological disorder?

value.fullName: Headaches/Migraines?
value.label: Headaches/Migraines?

value.fullName: Mental health condition including severe anxiety, PTSD and/or depression that may impact your abilities to carry out your professional tasks?
value.label: Mental health condition including severe anxiety, PTSD and/or depression that may impact your abilities to carry out your professional tasks?

value.fullName: High blood pressure, chest pain or heart or circulatory trouble?
value.label: High blood pressure, chest pain or heart or circulatory trouble?

value.fullName: Asthma, chronic bronchitis or other chest problems?
value.label: Asthma, chronic bronchitis or other chest problems?

value.fullName: Auto Immune Disease or on immunosuppressant medication?
value.label: Auto Immune Disease or on immunosuppressant medication?

value.fullName: Nail infections, or chronic skin infections?
value.label: Nail infections, or chronic skin infections?

value.fullName: Eczema, dermatitis, hives or other skin rashes or complaints?
value.label: Eczema, dermatitis, hives or other skin rashes or complaints?

value.fullName: Have you ever been diagnosed with latex allergy?
value.label: Have you ever been diagnosed with latex allergy?

value.fullName: Any impairment with vision or hearing?
value.label: Any impairment with vision or hearing?

value.fullName: Have you ever sustained a work-related injury or illness? If so, how was it addressed, and what preventative measures have you taken since then?
value.label: Have you ever sustained a work-related injury or illness? If so, how was it addressed, and what preventative measures have you taken since then?

value.fullName: Have you had a full medical clearance for any injury identified in these questions?
value.label: Have you had a full medical clearance for any injury identified in these questions?

value.fullName: Have you ever had difficulties wearing PPE including closed in shoes?
value.label: Have you ever had difficulties wearing PPE including closed in shoes?
